reviews.review_msg: Scott is amazing. An absolute gem. If you need to take any financial or accounting course (previously was BUS 510, now changed to BUS 705), make sure to take it with Scott.

Scott is a really good prof. He provides engaging and high quality videos to explain the key concepts. His Exams are fair. He tests the key concepts. His lecturers are engaging and provides accounting career advice. His lecture videos and ppts are enough to prepare for the exams. Reading the book is not very necessary.

Scott is by far one of the best profs I've had. Keep in mind that BUS 320 is not an easy course, but Scott makes the experience so much better. He has amazing energy and truly cares about his students and you can see that he loves his job. If I have the chance I would definitely take another class with him. Highly recommend!

Very caring, knowledgeable and responsive professor. By far one of my favourite profs at SFU. And sometimes his recorded lectures are also quite witty too (really helps especially during stressful time). Highly recommended!

For real though, take 320 with Scott. I usually never like my profs but this guy is a real one. His lectures and lecture videos are top notch. Cares about students and provides options to those afraid of asking questions publicly. He also has industry experience and gives you advice. Stand up guy.

Scott is one of the best profs I have had at Beedie. He was so caring and would really provide opportunities for students to excel. The videos he records must have taken him so much time and he had such a professional set up for online classes I really respected him. He had a kid during the term and was still able to be accessible. Highly recommend

Professor Scott MacEachern is the best prof in SFU. The course ran both synchronously and asynchronously. I did not do good on the first midterm, yet I still enjoyed learning accounting. He does not give tricky questions- the ones covered in class and homework are testable! If possible, take a course with him. You will not regret it.

Scott is the GOAT. Funniest guy you will ever meet. His videos are seriously entertaining. He turns a boring subject like accounting into something fun. Highly recommend taking a class with Scott if possible. Hes a really nice guy and our whole class loved him to death

Fall20. Best prof so far during remote. Makes the best video lectures. Pre-recorded videos are multiple short videos, so its easy to maintain focus. His tone captures your attention unlike other boring profs. I thought Ill get bored in this class cos its Accounting, but no, he has excellent teaching style, very modern. Exams are well written.

Scott is hands down the best prof I've ever had. Lots of weekly homework and readings for a 3 unit course but overall the homework-type questions are fairly similar to the midterms and final. Would 100% recommend taking any course with Scott!
